labels.zh-CN: Ames 最小二乘：从数据到投影
labels.en: Ames least squares: from data to projection

labels.zh-CN: 同一份本地快照 · 2,927 套房屋
五个标准化特征 + 一列截距
labels.en: Five standardized features plus an intercept

labels.zh-CN: 在列空间中寻找离 y 最近的预测
labels.en: Find the prediction in the column space closest to y

labels.zh-CN: 高维关系示意，不按实际尺度
labels.en: High-dimensional relationship schematic, not to scale

labels.zh-CN: 最近点的残差与每一列正交
labels.en: The residual at the closest point is orthogonal to every column

labels.zh-CN: 每一项 xⱼᵀr 都接近 0
labels.en: Every component x_j-transpose-r is near zero

labels.zh-CN: 两个数，回答两个不同问题
labels.en: Two numbers answer two different questions
How far are predictions from targets?

labels.zh-CN: 当前系数满足一阶条件吗？
labels.en: Do the current coefficients satisfy the first-order condition?

labels.zh-CN: 正交成立，不代表 RMSE 很小
labels.en: Orthogonality does not imply a small RMSE

labels.zh-CN: 把正交条件整理成下一章的线性系统
labels.en: Rearrange orthogonality into the next lesson's linear system
Normal equations are a teaching bridge
Do not explicitly compute G inverse

labels.zh-CN: 能否把 G 分解一次，求解多个右端项？
labels.en: Can G be factored once to solve multiple right-hand sides?

labels.zh-CN: 下一段：LUP 分解与复用
